name: Metricool
tagline: Social media management with built-in ad analytics
description: Metricool is an all-in-one social media management platform covering scheduling, analytics, competitor analysis, and advertising performance in one dashboard. Popular with agencies and freelancers for its combination of social media scheduling and ad campaign tracking (Google Ads, Meta Ads) at a competitive price.
pros: Includes ad analytics (Meta, Google) — unique at this price
cons: Less polished than Later or Buffer
Analytics depth limited on lower plans
use_cases: You're a freelancer or agency managing multiple client brands and want scheduling plus white-label reporting in one affordable tool
You run paid ads on Meta or Google and want to see social media and ad performance in the same dashboard
You want to monitor competitor social accounts alongside your own posting calendar
Your team needs best-time-to-post recommendations and automated scheduling without paying Sprout Social prices
